prompt: Wide panoramic scene split into three vignettes connected by flowing lines. Left: a parent on a couch scrolling past an irrelevant ad on their phone, mildly annoyed. Center: a bakery owner in an apron standing behind a counter, looking confused at a laptop showing a complicated ad dashboard with too many charts. Right: a journalist at a desk in a small newsroom, writing on a laptop with a subtle 'ad revenue' graph visible on a monitor behind them. The three scenes flow into each other naturally, connected by dotted lines suggesting a shared ecosystem. Warm, empathetic mood. No text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Three everyday people affected by advertising: a consumer seeing irrelevant ads, a small business owner struggling with ad tech complexity, and a journalist whose work depends on ad revenue

prompt: Two-part scene. Left side: Sam, a media buyer in his early 30s, Nigerian heritage, dark skin, close-cropped hair with a sharp fade, wearing a light blue button-down shirt with sleeves rolled to the elbows, sitting at a desk with multiple screens. A friendly teal robot agent (rounded features, expressive eyes, slightly smaller than a person) stands beside him, both looking at a unified dashboard showing results from multiple platforms consolidated into one view. Right side: Priya, a woman in her late 30s, South Indian heritage, dark brown skin, black hair in a short asymmetric bob, wearing rectangular dark-framed glasses and a solid-color crew-neck top under a light jacket, at a tech office with streaming/video screens. Her own teal robot agent stands with her, connecting her inventory to buyers through glowing connection lines that bridge to Sam's side. The two scenes are connected by flowing data lines between the agents. Mood: collaborative, energetic, things working together. No text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam the media buyer and Priya the publisher, each working with AI agents that connect them across platforms — the promise of agentic advertising

prompt: Split scene with stark contrast. Left half (slightly chaotic, warmer/orange-tinted): multiple small teal robots running in different directions without coordination, one robot carelessly knocking over a brand shield emblem, another blindly throwing money/coins, a third ignoring a stop sign. A concerned woman watches from above — this represents unchecked automation. Right half (structured, cool teal tones): Jordan, a woman in her mid-30s, Latina, warm brown skin, dark wavy hair past shoulders, wearing small silver hoop earrings and a fitted cardigan over a collared shirt, standing at a desk reviewing a governance dashboard. Around her, robots operate within clearly defined lanes with checkpoints and approval gates. One robot pauses at a checkpoint, looking up at Jordan for approval. She gives a calm thumbs up. The contrast is messy vs. structured, not dystopian vs. utopian. A clear dividing line separates the two halves. No text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: The stakes of agentic advertising: without governance, agents optimize blindly. With governance, humans like Jordan stay in the loop on decisions that matter.

prompt: Large ensemble scene showing the full cast of characters in a warm, connected composition around a circular table or gathering space. Center: Addie, a sleek teal/emerald robot with rounded approachable features, expressive eyes, slightly smaller than the humans, with a small emblem on the chest — she stands at the center facilitating. Around the gathering: Alex Reeves (woman, early 40s, Black, medium-length locs pulled back, tortoiseshell glasses pushed up on her head, structured blazer) reviewing the big picture. Sam Adeyemi (man, early 30s, Nigerian heritage, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, rolled sleeves) working on campaign data. Jordan Ochoa (woman, mid-30s, Latina, warm brown skin, dark wavy hair past shoulders, silver hoop earrings, fitted cardigan) checking governance rules. Maya Johal (woman, late 20s, South Asian, brown skin, long dark hair in a loose braid, bold colorful scarf, chunky rings) reviewing creative mockups on a tablet. Priya Nair (woman, late 30s, South Indian, dark brown skin, asymmetric black bob, dark rectangular glasses, solid crew-neck under light jacket) showing her platform architecture. Kai Lindgren (man, early 30s, Swedish, light skin, sandy blond hair pushed back, henley shirt and puffer vest) presenting data insights. Tomoko Hara (woman, late 40s, Japanese, light brown skin, precise chin-length black hair, tailored navy jacket, small stud earrings) holding brand guidelines. Dayo Mensah (person, early-to-mid 20s, Ghanaian heritage, dark skin, short natural TWA hair, bright open expression, crew-neck tee with messenger bag, holding a notebook) looking engaged and taking notes. The scene conveys collaboration across different companies and roles — agency, publisher, data provider, brand, newcomer, and AI — all working toward something together. Warm, hopeful mood. The environment should feel like a modern conference or workshop space. No text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: The full AgenticAdvertising.org community: Alex, Sam, Jordan, Maya, Priya, Kai, Tomoko, Dayo, and Addie — agency, publisher, data provider, brand, emerging talent, and AI agent — working together

prompt: Wide panoramic scene showing positive outcomes, returning to the people from Panel 1 but now thriving. Left: the bakery from before, now with a full shop, customers at the counter, and a second 'Grand Opening' banner visible through a window next door — the bakery owner (same person in apron) is smiling and greeting customers. Center: the journalist's newsroom is now bigger, with more desks and colleagues, the journalist writing confidently — the ad revenue graph on the monitor behind them trends upward. Right: a new vignette — an entrepreneur in Nairobi (young woman at a simple desk with a laptop in a bright, sunlit workspace) with her product shipping boxes visible and a map showing customer dots spreading across a continent. The three vignettes are connected by subtle flowing lines that echo Panel 1's composition but now pulse with warm energy instead of disconnect. Warm, optimistic mood with warmer color accents (touches of amber and gold alongside the teal). No text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: The outcomes of advertising that works: a bakery expanding, a newsroom growing, an entrepreneur in Nairobi reaching new customers — advertising as an engine of growth

prompt: Simple, inviting scene. The full cast from Panel 4 (Alex with locs and glasses on head, Sam with rolled sleeves, Jordan with silver hoops, Maya with colorful scarf, Priya with asymmetric bob and dark glasses, Kai with blond hair and puffer vest, Tomoko in tailored navy jacket, Dayo with messenger bag and notebook, and Addie the teal robot with org emblem) are arranged in a loose semicircle facing the viewer. They look welcoming, as if making space for someone new to join them. Addie extends a hand/appendage toward the viewer in a warm gesture. The background is minimal — light, clean, open — suggesting possibility. The mood is invitational, not corporate. Like the last panel of a graphic novel that says 'to be continued — with you.' No text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: The AgenticAdvertising.org community welcoming you in — the cast faces the viewer with Addie extending a hand, making space for you to join
